channel.title: Bubble on Hanchen's Space Bar
channel.description: Recent content in Bubble on Hanchen's Space Bar

item.title: The Token Economy is Booming. But Which Stage of the Bubble Are We In?
item.description: Revenue growth at Cursor, Anthropic, and OpenAI looks phenomenal. Nvidia calls it a 'token factory' economy. But a closer look reveals a familiar pattern — one we've seen before, and one that didn't end well.
